title: Cocktails Delight
description: 40+ New Cocktails for Brewin' & Chewin'!  Integrations for Thirst Was Taken and 12 other Farmer's Delight Add-Ons!
body:
![Cocktails Delight banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8801728eaf80d519399f58d7d742b1ba076e30ef.png)
This mod adds more drinks to Brewin' and Chewin' made from ingredients from other Farmer's Delight add-ons.

_<sup>([Brewin' and Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) required)</sup>_

# Forty + Drinks

Depending on what other popular food mods or Farmer's Delight add-ons you add, you can have access to more than forty drinks such as the Pina Colada, Tequila Sunrise, Brass Monkey, and the Funky Cold Medina.

Without other add-ons, you'll still get plenty of extra drinks, including: Hard Cider, Tequila, White Rum, Whiskey, Boilermaker, Gin and Sweet Red Wine.

If you don't know what ingredients you're missing for recipes JEI doesn't show, check the [Wiki](https://github.com/DraconicArcher/CocktailsDelight/wiki/Cocktails-Delight).
![Cocktails Delight drinks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b8d3f188afb4bdc0a3759c199c3a01afc8a083.png)

# New Effects!

All drinks have effects and all wines add either Arrow Looting or Overdraw (or both!)
- Arrow Looting: all arrows have the Looting ability
- Overdraw: arrows do 25% more damage, at the cost of 3 Durability.
- Wisdom: double XP
- Hurricane: increases damage by 5%, by 10% in rain, and by 25% in a thunderstorm.

___

# The Grapes Update!

Thanks to a wonderful patron, Cocktails Delight now comes with its own grapes! No need to worry anymore about finding a mod with grapes that suits you.

![Red Grapes sprite set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d52d7cb89090233de7450bb56916650abac76da8.png)
![White Grapes sprite set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e224ab70da0e81ed7064386bca3cb53f9ae83a2a.png)

___

# The China Blue/Gin and Tonic Update!

The latest update includes Gin and Blue Curacao, and 15 drinks that can be made from them!

Wines can also be made with the grapes from Hearth and Harvest!

___

# Compatibility

So far Cocktails Delight is compatible with:
- [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken)
- [Fruits Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/fruits-delight)
- [Extra Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/extradelight)
- [Hearth and Harvest](https://modrinth.com/mod/hearth-and-harvest)
- [Berries and Cherries Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/berries-and-cherries)
- [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics)
- [Pam's Harvestcraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/pams-harvestcraft)
- [Croptopia](https://modrinth.com/mod/croptopia-delight)
- [Neopolitan](https://modrinth.com/mod/neapolitan)
- [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight)
- [Vegan Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/vegan-delight)

## Thirst was Taken
Has thirst values integrated out of the box, no need to add them to the TwT config.

## Vegan Delight
You can make Brewin' and Chewin' Cheeses with Soy Milk

New with this update! Soy wax! The keg, candles and cheeses can now be made without honeycomb. Soy Wax can also be made with Soybeans from Pam's Harvestcraft or Croptopia

___

Thanks to [never](https://www.curseforge.com/members/never_was_taken/projects) for the art!

Thanks to LimeOn, HVMANOPHOBIA, Pygargue00fr, and ウーロンコヤンイ for the translations

Thanks to Bryan Brightside for the Create recipes



Feel free to suggest more drinks on [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
